src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Refactor the LoggingAspect class into a Java record to leverage immutable state and reduced boilerplate.
Modernize Javadoc comment style by using HTML paragraph tags instead of blank lines.
src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.human_impl:
*

* By default, it only runs with the "dev" profile.

src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Align Javadoc parameter descriptions for improved readability.
Introduce Lombok annotations to replace boilerplate getter and setter methods.
Remove class-level Javadoc documentation that is no longer needed or relevant.
Replace manual getter method for 'liquibase' field with @Getter annotation.
src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.human_impl: Removed getLiquibase() method, added @Getter to class.

src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Replace manual setter method for 'asyncStart' field with @Setter annotation.
src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.human_impl: Removed setAsyncStart() method, added @Setter to Liquibase class.

src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Replace manual getter method for 'asyncStart' field with @Getter annotation.
src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.human_impl: Removed getAsyncStart() method, added @Getter to Liquibase class.

src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Remove JHipster generator needle comments that are no longer required.
Add Lombok library to the project dependencies to enable annotation processing.
Replace manual constructor injection with Lombok's @RequiredArgsConstructor annotation to reduce boilerplate.
Remove the @Profile annotation to make the configuration active in all profiles rather than excluding specific test profiles.
Replace mutable HashMap initialization with immutable Map.of() factory method introduced in Java 9.
Remove imports for Collections and HashMap that are no longer used after switching to Map.of().
src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.human_impl: Removed import java.util.Collections; and import java.util.HashMap;

src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Refactor toAnsiString to remove the redundant string argument since the replacement character is hardcoded.
src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.human_impl: Changed toAnsiString(String in, AnsiElement element) to toAnsiString(AnsiElement element) and hardcoded "_".

src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Configure JPA repositories to extend a custom base implementation class for shared search functionality.
Add @NonNull annotation to method parameter to satisfy stricter null-safety checks or static analysis in the newer environment.
src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.human_impl: import org.springframework.lang.NonNull; ... public void addFormatters(@NonNull FormatterRegistry registry)

src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Replace explicit generic type arguments in the anonymous class instantiation with the diamond operator for brevity.
Replace explicit constructor with Lombok @RequiredArgsConstructor to reduce boilerplate.
Update Spring Security CSRF configuration to use method reference instead of lambda.
Reformat authorization request matchers to use multi-line arguments for better readability.
Update imports to use specific classes instead of wildcards and add missing dependencies.
Update static import to reflect the relocation of SecurityUtils class from security to util package.
Replace manual constructor with Lombok @RequiredArgsConstructor to reduce boilerplate.
Add JetBrains @NotNull annotations to method parameters for static analysis.
src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.human_impl: Added @NotNull to ResourceHandlerRegistry and ResourceHandlerRegistration parameters.

src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Removed an unnecessary blank line between field declarations to tighten code structure.
src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.human_impl: Deleted empty line between `env` and `jHipsterProperties` fields.

src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Removed a redundant comment explaining standard Spring Boot behavior that is self-evident from the method name.
src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.human_impl: Deleted comment '// When running in an IDE or with ./mvnw spring-boot:run, set location of the static web assets.'

src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Remove suppression annotation that is no longer needed after refactoring boilerplate code.
Update imports to reflect the removal of unused classes and addition of new dependencies.
